input: text-attributed graph (nodes with textual features, graph structure)
backbone: GNN adapter (e.g., GraphSAGE, GCN) + frozen LLM (e.g., Llama 2)
loss: next token prediction (auto-regressive on node text)
key_idea: use a lightweight GNN as an adapter to bridge graph structure and LLM, enabling efficient fine-tuning with frozen LLM
datasets: multiple real-world TAGs (e.g., ogbn-arxiv, PubMed, etc.)
